commit_scope: Add Form-native real mesh training emitter receipts and a host carrier that writes active or blocked machine evidence.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/pareto.fk form-stdlib/autoresearch-loop.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-carrier.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-emitter.fk form-stdlib/tests/real-mesh-training-emitter-band.fk
local_validation.notes: real-mesh-training-emitter validates at verdict 255 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. The focused fourth-arm gate returns PASS-4WAY real-mesh-training-emitter. The host carrier writes blocked receipts instead of pretending when the machine lacks data floor inputs. The run-models probe observed live witness HTTP sources, macOS TTS output bytes, and two completed local Ollama llama3.2:3b process receipts.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form and host-carrier slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The mesh can now produce a real machine receipt for Mac/Android/model training emitters and keep the window blocked until adb, data volume, heldout, labels, and configured STT/model lanes are present.
public_endpoints: n/a: local Form and host-carrier proof

phase_gate.gate: Host carriers must emit real active or blocked receipts from machine-observed HTTP, adb, data-root, and local model evidence.
phase_gate.next: After PR CI, provide adb-visible Android and large train/heldout roots, configure Whisper, then run the emitter with --require-active and feed the receipt into the dashboard.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: The carrier recipe could define the hard real-window authority floor, but no local host command emitted the matching pass/block receipt from live machine state.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: A Form recipe validates emitter receipts, the fourth-arm manifest admits the row at 255, and a no-Python host carrier emits live witness/source/process receipts with explicit blocks for missing adb, Whisper, train bytes, heldout bytes, or labels.
retuned_north_star: continuous Mac/Android capture roots feed the emitter until the active floor is met
local Whisper, TTS, Ollama, vision, multimodal, AutoML, and autoresearch processes write comparable receipts
dashboard and route choice read the same Form-native active/blocked receipt
